name: King Fabian -Chrono Escapes-
description:
Hello Traveler! We humbly thank you for choosing to take a wonderous time travel vacation with Chrono Escapes! Here you have chosen a breezy trip to the middle ages, a time with knights and kings! Just be sure to not be seen by a local/get in trouble with the law or your contract will be nullified, leaving you in the middle ages!





-Part of the Time Travel Vacation series-

Art by koutanagamori
creator: FurryTrash23
